category_sources: Official Tarlz page describes it as a combined tar archiver and lzip compressor using lzlib; source_facts.description says data compressor.
display_name_sources: Official project page heading uses Tarlz; source_facts.name is tarlz.
docs_sources: Official Tarlz page links to an online manual and says the manual is also available via the GNU info system.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Tarlz page points to release tarballs and the Savannah lzip project page, but no official source-control repository URL was identified.
tags_sources: Official Tarlz page describes tar archive creation with lzip compression; source_facts.executables lists tarlz.
